name: social_post_formatter
description: Format content for social media platforms (X/Twitter 280 chars, LinkedIn long-form, Facebook, Instagram captions). Returns ready-to-post text.

action.description: Action: 'format' to create platform-specific posts, 'calendar' to generate a content calendar

platform.description: Target platform: 'x' (Twitter/X, 280 chars), 'linkedin' (professional), 'facebook' (casual), 'instagram' (visual caption), 'all' (generate for all platforms)

topic.description: The topic or content to post about

job_data.description: Job posting data: {title, location, url, company}

industry_news.description: Industry news or trend to incorporate into the post

instructions:
Use this tool to format social media posts for different platforms. It generates platform-appropriate text with hashtags, character limits, and formatting.

**Actions:**
- `format` — Generate a post for one or all platforms
- `calendar` — Generate a week of content ideas

**To post on social media**, use the Browser tool to:
1. Navigate to the platform (x.com, linkedin.com)
2. Log in (user does this once)
3. Use click/type to create a new post
4. Paste the formatted content
5. Submit

**Example workflow:**
1. web_scraper → get job postings from careers page
2. web_search → find industry news related to the jobs
3. social_post_formatter → create platform-specific posts
4. browser → navigate to X.com and post
